items: The sidebar "Update available" chip now carries a calm, continuous glowing border instead of a one-time blink — easy to spot the whole time an update is waiting, with a static glow under reduced motion.
In Settings → Updates, the "Update now & restart" button now sits directly under the version label, above the release notes — so long notes can no longer push it below the scroll fold.
The Kanban board's "move all cards right" button now uses a simple ">" chevron, reading more clearly as "move to the next column."
The Schedule session modal's optional prompt field now appears genuinely empty instead of showing placeholder text that looked like a pre-filled prompt for the agent.
